---
title: "2026 EBS pollock assessment workspace"
subtitle: "Data readiness, bridge lineage, and review schedule"
---

## Status

The 2026 assessment is in data assembly and bridge-definition phase. The data
inventory was last reviewed on July 17, 2026.

There was no operational assessment in 2025. The accepted assessment anchor is
therefore the 2024 Model 23 assessment. Work conducted during 2025 in response
to the CIE review is a development bridge, not an accepted 2025 assessment.

## Review milestones

| Milestone | Timing | Data treatment |
|---|---|---|
| Draft review | Early September 2026 | Freeze a documented set; label preliminary and missing products |
| Final review | November 2026 | Replace preliminary deliveries and rerun affected analyses |

Exact review and freeze dates remain to be confirmed.

## Data currently located

Candidate local products have been found for 2025 fishery catch and weight at
age, FT-NIRS ages, the 2025 bottom-trawl covariance/index, a combined model input,
and AVO processing. These are not considered final merely because files exist.
Each still requires ownership, version, units, processing, and suitability checks.

The 2026 survey products and current-year catch snapshots remain pending or need
their delivery dates confirmed.

See the [assessment dashboard](dashboard.qmd), [working SAFE draft](assessment.qmd),
[`data-manifest.csv`](data-manifest.csv), and
[`run-manifest.csv`](run-manifest.csv).

## Bridge logic

1. reproduce the accepted 2024 assessment;
2. reconstruct and enumerate the September 2025 post-CIE changes;
3. update the unchanged 2024 model with confirmed new data;
4. add approved method changes sequentially;
5. select the September candidate and repeat the data update for November.
